---
name: Term request
about: Propose a new class, property, or individual for SCON
title: "[TERM] "
labels: term-request
---

**Proposed label**
(e.g., "peer mediation session")

**Definition (genus–differentia, IAO:0000115 style)**
A ... that ...

**Parent class (genus)**
(e.g., CounsellingProcess)

**Module**
(core | academic | career | social-emotional | risk-safeguarding | governance | higher-education | intelligent-systems | temporal)

**Competency question(s) or use case served**

**Source / evidence**
(ASCA standard, CASEL, O*NET, literature, etc.)

**Checklist**
- [ ] Grounded under a BFO/OBO genus
- [ ] Carries a definition
- [ ] Does not duplicate an existing term
- [ ] Keeps the ontology consistent under HermiT
